content: Use a compatible app such as Google Authenticator for <1>Android</1> and <4>iOS</4>, or Authenticator for <8>Windows Phone</8>.

comment.text: This is a descriptive text providing instructions for users to download a compatible authenticator app. It appears during two-factor authentication setup and includes links to Android, iOS, and Windows Phone app stores.

usage.context: {t("GetSuitableApp")}
